debug_text.text: 'NotificationFilter: Ship Constructed Notification filters. Ship: %s, Class S: %s, Class M: %s, Class L: %s, Class XL: %s, Money: %s, Filter Money: %s, Filter S: %s, Filter M: %s, Filter L: %s, Filter XL: %s, Filtered: %s.'. [$object.knownname, $object.isclass.{class.ship_s}, $object.isclass.{class.ship_m}, $object.isclass.{class.ship_l}, $object.isclass.{class.ship_xl}, $finishedbuildprice.formatted.default, (@$filters.$shipConstructedMoney * 1Cr).formatted.default, @$filters.$shipConstructedClassS, @$filters.$shipConstructedClassM, @$filters.$shipConstructedClassL, @$filters.$shipConstructedClassXL, $filtered]

replace.sel: /aiscript/interrupts/handler/actions/do_if[@value="event.name == 'event_build_finished'"]/do_if[@value='$object']/do_if[@value='event.param3.exists and $object.isclass.ship']/do_elseif[@value='event.param3.base and event.param3.isshipbuild']/do_if[@value='$finishedbuildprice gt 0 and @this.station.isplayerowned and not $playerownedobject']/write_to_logbook[@category='upkeep']
